---
title: "Muizz Aman Khan"
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image: coolpic.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Muizzzzz
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muizz-aman-khan-1a8535312/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:khanm@lawrence.edu
---


Hi, I'm Muizz, a Data science / CS student at Lawrence University in Appleton, Wisconsin. My interest in Data science stems from my computer science interests and I wish to improve and utilize those skills to solve real world problems with data.

This site collects my projects and the things I'm working on. Take a look around.

## Skills

Java (FX/FXML), Python, C++, SQL, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, R, TypeScript

## Beyond Class

I love playing video games (especially Pokemon as you'll see with my projects) and watching anime. I've started playing Persona which is a JRPG similar to Pokemon and it has piqued my interest quite a bit. My favorite anime is One Piece (contact me if you want to talk about this stuff, I'm open to it).

I feel like making projects related to those interests allows me to explore the field of data science in my own fun way and gain experience with working on data that people usually don't work on.
